pr.title: Add non-record submission: Depth Recurrence + TTT + Gradient Checkpointing

output.summary: Depth-recurrent transformer loops (3 blocks ×4) with U-Net skips, TTT, and gradient checkpointing for DDP-enabled training plus final sliding-window eval.
techniques: Reused 3 unique transformer blocks across 4 loops with per-iteration RMSNorm and U-Net skip connections
Swapped torch.compile for gradient checkpointing during DDP training, re-enabling torch.compile post-training for fast eval
Reserved sliding-window eval and TTT adaptation for the final evaluation stage
